column1: # When workflow-COPYME-ocl_analysis is copied to workflow-RUN_N-ocl_analysis,
# this manifest travels with it and describes which files from
# OUTPUT_pipeline/structure_*/N-output/ get published to the server.
# COLUMNS (TAB-separated — mind the tab count; header row REQUIRED):
#   source_path     Path to file(s). Relative to this manifest's directory.
#   display_label   (optional) Human-readable title shown in the web UI.
#   file_category   (optional) Grouping label: visualization | tree | alignment
#   order           (optional) Integer sort key within category (default 100).
# This COPYME template has every line set to `no` — in the actual RUN_N copy,
# flip to `yes` for files you want published. Glob patterns span all 105
#   Tier 3 = interpretable OCL results (the scientific deliverables)
# ----- Tier 3 -- interpretable OCL results (per structure, all 105) -----
